Product-oriented.label_zh: 产品功能概念导向素材
Product-oriented.goal: V13 functional brand concept with source-image-first grounding, sharper discriminant separation, and function_v2-style execution discipline.
Product-oriented.primary_route: functional problem solving, task support, or practical affordance

Symbolic-oriented.label_zh: 象征品牌概念导向素材
Symbolic-oriented.goal: V13 symbolic brand concept with source-image-first grounding, sharper discriminant separation, and function_v2-style execution discipline.
Symbolic-oriented.primary_route: symbolic meaning, self-expression, role, group, or identity relevance

Experiential-oriented.label_zh: 体验品牌概念导向素材
Experiential-oriented.goal: V13 experiential brand concept with source-image-first grounding, sharper discriminant separation, and function_v2-style execution discipline.
Experiential-oriented.primary_route: felt experience, sensory pleasure, variety, or cognitive stimulation

Context-oriented.label_zh: 使用场景导向素材（旧名，v13 中并入体验品牌概念导向）
Context-oriented.goal: Deprecated v13 alias. Use Experiential-oriented for Park-theory-grounded runs.
Context-oriented.primary_route: alias of experiential brand concept definition

Affect-oriented.label_zh: 情感导向素材（旧名，已并入象征品牌概念导向）
Affect-oriented.goal: Deprecated alias. Use Symbolic-oriented for new runs.
Affect-oriented.primary_route: alias of symbolic brand concept definition
